name: Argan Oil
short_desc: Lightweight nourishing oil that helps moisturize skin, hair and nails.

name: Rosehip Oil
short_desc: Rich in essential fatty acids; helps soften the appearance of fine lines and dullness.

name: Aloe Vera Gel
short_desc: Cooling gel that helps soothe and comfort sensitive skin.

name: Shea Butter
short_desc: Deeply nourishing butter for very dry skin and body care.

name: Clay Face Mask
short_desc: Purifying clay mask that helps mattify oily and combination skin.

name: Rose Water
short_desc: Gentle floral toner traditionally used in Moroccan skincare.
